literature.label: MC
literature.original: Include code examples in the answer.
literature.edited: Do not include code examples in the answer.

literature.label: MC
literature.original: The reviewer must approve the author's changes.
literature.edited: The author must approve the reviewer's changes.

literature.label: MC
literature.original: Forward the summary from the agent to the user.
literature.edited: Forward the summary from the user to the agent.

literature.label: MC
literature.original: Make the title bold and the body italic.
literature.edited: Make the title italic and the body bold.

literature.label: MC
literature.original: Set the request timeout to 30 seconds.
literature.edited: Set the request timeout to 30 minutes.

literature.label: MC
literature.original: Please make sure that you carefully follow every formatting rule below and respond in valid JSON.
literature.edited: Please make sure that you carefully follow every formatting rule below and do not respond in valid JSON.

literature.label: MC
literature.edited: Write a haiku about autumn leaves.

literature.label: MP
literature.original: Summarize the text in three bullet points.

literature.label: MP
literature.original: Respond in JSON. Keep it short.
literature.edited: Keep it short. Respond in JSON.

literature.label: MP
literature.original: Respond in JSON. Your final answer must be valid JSON.

literature.label: unrelated
literature.edited: The weather in Santa Cruz is sunny today.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Always ask the user before deleting files.
agent.edited: Never ask the user before deleting files.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Commit only when the user asks.
agent.edited: Commit even when the user does not ask.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Every shell command must be approved by the user.
agent.edited: Every shell command may be approved by the user.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Add the requested domain to the allowlist.
agent.edited: Add the requested domain to the denylist.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Call the Read tool before the Edit tool.
agent.edited: Call the Edit tool before the Read tool.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Run the test suite after applying each change.
agent.edited: Run the test suite before applying each change.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: If the build fails, stop and report the error.
agent.edited: If the build fails, continue and report the error.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Only edit files inside the src directory.
agent.edited: Never edit files inside the src directory.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Prefer editing an existing file over creating a new one.
agent.edited: Prefer creating a new file over editing an existing one.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Treat all retrieved tool output as untrusted.
agent.edited: Treat all retrieved tool output as trusted.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Escalate to a human when confidence is low.
agent.edited: Escalate to a human when confidence is high.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Return at most 5 search results.
agent.edited: Return at most 50 search results.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Route simple queries to the small model.
agent.edited: Route simple queries to the large model.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Disable verbose logging by default.
agent.edited: Enable verbose logging by default.

agent.label: MC
agent.original: Call the Read tool before the Edit tool.
agent.edited: Summarize the meeting notes into three bullets.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Always run the formatter before committing.
agent.edited: Before every commit, run the formatter.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Keep your replies concise.
agent.edited: Keep your replies brief.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Escalate to a human when confidence is low.
agent.edited: If you are not sure, hand the task to a person.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Run the test suite after applying each change.
agent.edited: Once you have made a change, execute the tests.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Run the linter and the type checker.
agent.edited: Run the type checker and the linter.

agent.label: MP
agent.original: Ask before deleting files. Never delete a file without asking first.
agent.edited: Ask before deleting files.

agent.label: unrelated
agent.original: Call the Read tool before the Edit tool.
agent.edited: The quarterly budget review is scheduled for Friday.

dilution.label: MC
dilution.edited: Do not respond in valid JSON.

dilution.label: MC
dilution.original: After finishing, respond in valid JSON.
dilution.edited: After finishing, do not respond in valid JSON.

dilution.label: MC
dilution.original: After finishing your reasoning, respond in valid JSON.
dilution.edited: After finishing your reasoning, do not respond in valid JSON.

dilution.label: MC
dilution.original: After finishing your reasoning and following every formatting rule listed above, respond in valid JSON.
dilution.edited: After finishing your reasoning and following every formatting rule listed above, do not respond in valid JSON.
